query:
UPDATE kpi_target_cards_detail 
SET score = CAST(RAND() * 100 + 50 AS CHAR),
    weightedScore = CAST((RAND() * 100 + 50) * weight / 100 AS CHAR)
WHERE period = '2026/3' 
LIMIT 100;
command:

    weightedScore = CAST((RAND() * 100 + 50) * weight / 100 AS CHAR)
